title: Rufus Wainwright & Metropole Orkest
full_description: Rufus Wainwright and the Metropole Orkest join forces for a powerful tribute to legendary composer Kurt Weill, conducted by Chris Walden. Drawing from Wainwright's album I'm a Stranger Here Myself — Wainwright Does Weill, the programme blends classical, cabaret and jazz into a musical experience where melancholy and hope coexist. Works include Surabaya Johnny, September Song, and Je ne t'aime pas.
ai_summary: Rufus Wainwright brings his Kurt Weill tribute to Carré with the Metropole Orkest — drawing from his album Wainwright Does Weill in lush, jazz-inflected arrangements that honour the German-American composer's extraordinary range from Threepenny Opera cabaret to Hollywood ballad.
